rationale: Educ. Code §49.013 governs appeal procedures for commissioner decisions under Chapter 49. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 49.013. PROCEDURE. (a) Except as provided by Subchapter G, a decision of the commissioner under this chapter is appealable under Section 7.057.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns commissioner appeal procedure, not homestead exemption amounts.
